and ye doing alright nasuamComfy surprisingly sleep schedule change isnt killing me
sleep schedule change... is such thing even possible?
It's definitely possible, but it requires a more persistent mental motivation, like a job.

not exactly normal, but a more reasonable time ye, endfield shifted my schedule to sleeping at 10am, so I decided since I already wanted to shift schedule to be better for renovation work I decided to rawdog going to sleep at 6/7am and waking around 3/4pm, and so far not bad
Sometimes my schedule drifts a bunch and I just have to deal with it for a week or two until it fixes itself
Trying to fix it overnight just doesn't work
everyone's been asking if I stayed up to do it but that really didnt seem like the play to shift by just a couple hours
ye i got pulled into a "just one more objective" trap one too many times with a super long sidequest
whenever i go to a different time zone, I somehow just immediately shift to my busted sleep schedule by local time. never had a problem with jet lag, at least.
don't want to start wuling before I'm done with all the v4 sidequests
and now I'm just doing dailies
I mean to be fair wuling isnt finished so you'd get to a "to be continued" and then just be like me having nothing but dailies nasuamSlain
on the bright side it means I dont have the temptation to pull me away from work on the new model for anniversary nihmunThumbs
